testsuite.name: de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.MutatorsTest

testcase.name: repeatRandomCharacter on a single character yields a run of that character()

failure.message: kotlin.NotImplementedError: An operation is not implemented: Exercise 1: repeat one randomly chosen character a random number of times
